zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon於大約1035年出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，他的父親Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre36歲，母親Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France33歲。他和Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1098年在以色列מחוז ירושלים享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon was born about 1035, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, his father, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, was 36 and his mother, Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France, was 33. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable. He died about 1098, in Jerusalem, Israel, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon est né environ 1035, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable. Il est décédé environ 1098, à Jerusalem, Israël, à l’âge de 65 ans.

Er hatte mit Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1098 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Jerusalem, Israel.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1098년 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon родился около 1035 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France, 33. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable. Он умер около 1098 г. в местности מחוז ירושלים, Израиль в возрасте 65 лет.

es.Craon, 53084, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire,: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon nació aproximadamente 1035, en Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Renauld de Nevers I, Comte de Nevers ou Auxerre, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adelaide Havoise de Auxerre of France, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Hawise 'Blanche' de Sable. Murió aproximadamente 1098, en Jerusalem, Israel, a la edad de 65 años.
